zh.Broadclyst, Devon, England: 英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特
zh.Clist Champernowne, Devon, England: 英國戴文可利斯特 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver de Champernon於1171年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Henry de Champernon27歲，母親Rohese de Tracy23歲。他於大約1207年與Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan在英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1232年在英國戴文奧可哈普頓享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver de Champernon于1171年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Henry de Champernon27岁，母亲Rohese de Tracy23岁。他于大约1207年与Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan在英国戴文布洛阿可利斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1232年在英国戴文奧可哈普頓享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver de Champernon was born in 1171, in Devon, England, his father, Henry de Champernon, was 27 and his mother, Rohese de Tracy, was 23. He married Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan about 1207, in Broadclyst, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1232, in Okehampton, Devon, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver de Champernon est né en 1171, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Champernon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Tracy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan environ 1207, à Broadclyst, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1232, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oliver de Champernon 1171 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Champernon 27 und seine Mutter Rohese de Tracy 23. Er hat um 1207 in Broadclyst, Devon, England Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1232 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Okehampton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver de Champernon è nato il nel 1171 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Henry de Champernon, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Tracy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan circa 1207, nel Broadclyst, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1232, nel Okehampton, Devon, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver de Champernonが1171年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Henry de Champernonは27歳，母Rohese de Tracyは23歳であった。約1207年にイギリスデボンブロアドクリストでEva Andea Wymarca de Cardiganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1232年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver de Champernon(이)가 1171년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Champernon(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Tracy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1207년 영국 데폰 브로드클리스트에서 Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1232년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver de Champernon nasceu em 1171, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Champernon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Tracy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan aproximadamente 1207, em Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1232, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver de Champernon родился в 1171 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Champernon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Tracy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan около 1207 г. в местности броадклист, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1232 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oliver de Champernon nació en 1171, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Champernon, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Rohese de Tracy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan aproximadamente 1207, en Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1232, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
